channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BJP protests at CM Omar Abdullah’s residence demanding liquor prohibition in Kashmir Valley
item.description: On Friday, BJP workers staged a protest outside the residence of Jammu & Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah, urging the government to impose a prohibition on liquor in the Kashmir Valley. Altaf Thak...

item.title: Minister Masauni stresses importance of tree planting for sustainable forests and land management
item.description: Tanzania's Minister for Natural Resources and Tourism, Mr. Hamisi Masauni, has strongly emphasised the need for tree planting as a key measure to promote sustainable forest and land management across ...

item.title: Angeloh Explores Love and Culture in New Album 'Love Child'
item.description: Angeloh don drop him new album wey dem call 'Love Child The Album', and e dey show say him dey waka different from him usual gospel style. The 7-track album na blend of Afro-fusion, highlife, RnB, and...

item.title: Bruce Springsteen Avoids Chris Christie During Live Performance
item.description: During a recent concert, legendary musician Bruce Springsteen deliberately avoided former New Jersey Governor Chris Christie while greeting fans in the audience. As Springsteen walked through the crow...

item.title: Reflections on Friendship and Loneliness in Adulthood
item.description: The author reflects on how personal experience and academic research on friendship reshaped her understanding of loneliness. Despite achieving the conventional markers of adulthood—marriage, children,...

item.title: CS Wandayi Links Rising Fuel Prices in Kenya to Middle East Tensions
item.description: Nairobi — Energy CS Opiyo Wandayi has attributed the recent surge in fuel prices to the ongoing crisis in the Middle East, which has caused major disruptions in global energy markets. According to Wan...

item.title: Gautam Adani to inaugurate vision care programme in Bihar
item.description: The news article was intended to report that industrialist Gautam Adani will lead the inauguration of a new vision care initiative in Bihar. Unfortunately, the original article could not be accessed a...

item.title: Jaylon Properties Recognised as One of Nigeria’s Fastest Growing SMEs
item.description: Jaylon Properties don dey shine as dem enter BusinessDay Top 100 Fastest Growing SMEs, wey show say di company dey grow wella for Nigeria real estate and catering sector. Di company wey get head offic...

item.title: Successful Test Flight of the Upgraded Zhuque 2E Rocket
item.description: On May 14, 2026, at 03:00 UTC, Chinese company LandSpace conducted the first launch of the upgraded Zhuque 2E Y5 rocket from Launch Pad 96A at the Donfeng Commercial Space Experimental Zone near Jiuqu...

item.title: Sky Victor and Stepfather Tash Pay Tribute at Betty Bayo’s Grave on Mother’s Day
item.description: On Mother’s Day, Sky Victor, daughter of the late gospel musician Betty Bayo, together with her stepfather Tash, visited her mother’s grave in a deeply emotional moment. Sky shared how difficult it wa...

item.title: B.C. Premier Criticizes Federal-Alberta Pipeline Deal Amid Environmental and Indigenous Concerns
item.description: British Columbia Premier David Eby has criticised the federal government for entering into a pipeline agreement with Alberta, calling it a reward for 'bad behaviour.' The agreement, signed by Prime Mi...

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel Faces Scrutiny Over Personal Security Detail for Girlfriend
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel reportedly reacted angrily to an internal suggestion that the extensive security detail assigned to his girlfriend, country singer Alexis Wilkins, should undergo an ethics revi...

item.title: Kenya must fully use teacher‑coaching scheme to raise education quality
item.description: The article talks about a recent coaching initiative in Elgeyo Marakwet County where 12 coaches trained in a French municipality have been deployed to wards to support close to 900 teachers. The write...

item.title: Lopez Family Dispute Shifts from Boardroom to Courtrooms, Ceasefire Limited
item.description: The Lopez family feud has taken a temporary pause with the withdrawal of the February 27 board resolution that sought to remove Federico “Piki” Lopez as president and CEO of Lopez Inc., the family's p...

item.title: Palestinian Ambassador Urges Unity During Nakba Day Commemoration
item.description: The Palestinian envoy to Tanzania has made a call for unity as communities prepare to mark Nakba Day, a day of remembrance for Palestinians displaced during the 1948 conflict. In a statement issued on...

item.title: Yanga Partners with GSM to Build 20,000-Seat Modern Stadium in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Dar es Salaam is set to witness a major boost in sports infrastructure with the announcement of a new 20,000-seater stadium for Young Africans (Yanga). GSM Group CEO, Aisha Mohamed, highlighted that t...

item.title: Man Testifies About Dog Attacks Leading to Boy's Death
item.description: In Edmonton, a man provided testimony in court regarding a violent dog attack incident that ultimately resulted in the death of a young boy. According to the man, two dogs attacked him simultaneously,...

item.title: Manipur: 28 Naga and Kuki hostages freed after fresh violence in Kangpokpi and Senapati districts
item.description: In the latest development from Manipur, the state police have confirmed that 28 out of approximately 38 persons from the Naga and Kuki communities, who were taken hostage by armed groups, have been re...

item.title: Decline in Commercial Crime Convictions Despite More Courts and Prosecutors
item.description: Over the past two decades, South Africa has seen a sharp decrease in convictions for commercial crimes even as reported cases have increased. The National Prosecuting Authority's Specialised Commercia...

item.title: Access to full news article unavailable; original story blocked
item.description: The news article from Herald Sun about police arresting teenagers after a third alleged arson attempt at Bar Bambi could not be accessed. The website displayed a message indicating that the content wa...
